[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00010001 2
2 00000001 1
3 10000000 1
4 11001100 4
5 11000100 3
6 01000000 1
7 00100010 2

01 01111111 7
12 10010011 4
23 11111100 6
34 11111111 a
45 11011101 6
56 01101011 5
67 10111110 6
70 11110011 6

02 00011111 5
13 10110001 4
24 11111111 a
35 11011111 7
46 11001101 5
57 01101110 5
60 11110110 6
71 11111111 a

03 00111101 5
14 10111011 6

36 11001111 6
47 11101100 5
50 11100010 4
61 11111110 7
72 11010011 5

40 11100110 5

73 11110011 6

05 10011101 5
